measurements.value: Same gradient system as existing Hero (top-gradient class)

root.description: Full-width post hero block - uses same hero class + gradient system as existing Hero block

children.description: Reuses existing .top-gradient CSS class for accent-colored gradient overlay extending below the block
Contains background image layer + content layer, same pattern as existing Hero secondary
Absolute-positioned post thumbnail with mask gradient for progressive fade. Automatically pulled from post featured image.
children.notes: Image sourced from get_post_thumbnail_id() in PHP, not manual upload

children.description: Relative-positioned content over the background image, left-aligned
Standard container wrapper for max-width constraint
Vertical flex with 24px gap containing topic pill and post title
Rounded pill showing post's primary category/topic name. Background and border use the TOPIC's accent color (lighter/light variants). Text is charcoal, uppercase, 14px Roboto Medium.
children.colorSource: Topic's accent_color term meta -> maps to accent-lighter (bg) and accent-light (border)

children.description: Large heading using Anton Regular at 64px (text-header-0). Automatically pulled from post title. Same size/style as existing Hero secondary heading.
NOT shown in Figma design, but spec says it should be an option. Would appear between title and author/date meta.
children.notes: Spec explicitly says 'make it an option to display the excerpt below the title or not'. Default should be hidden.

children.description: Format: 'By: {Author Name}'. Roboto Medium, 18px, line-height 1.2, charcoal.
Format: 'Published on: {Date}'. Same typography as author. Date format from WP settings (get_the_date()).

possiblyOptional.reason: Not visible in the Figma design but explicitly mentioned in the spec as an optional toggle. 'Make it an option to display the excerpt below the title or not.'
possiblyOptional.visualEvidence: No excerpt text is visible in the Figma screenshot. The content goes directly from title to author/date metadata.

possiblyOptional.reason: Figma metadata shows a hidden button frame (669:33696, hidden=true) inside the lower group. This appears to be a remnant from the Hero secondary pattern, not intended for Post Hero.
possiblyOptional.visualEvidence: Frame 669:33696 has hidden=true in metadata, containing two Button instances that are not visible.

layoutRecommendations.approach: Single block (no inner blocks needed). This is a template-only block designed for single post views. All content is dynamically sourced from the post.
layoutRecommendations.structuralPattern: Follow the exact same structure as the existing Hero block's secondary variation: section > top-gradient + hero-inner > (background image layer + content layer). The only differences are: (1) no manual content fields - everything comes from the post, (2) topic pill replaces eyebrow, (3) author/date meta replaces CTA buttons, (4) optional excerpt toggle.

responsive.desktop: Left-aligned content, max-width ~700px, title at 64px (text-header-0). Background image with mask gradient.
responsive.mobile: Same left-aligned layout. Title should scale down similarly to existing Hero (40px on mobile, text-header-0 at md+). Content padding adjusts with container. Background image and gradient maintain same behavior.

accentColorSystem.default: Uses page accent color via body class (same as existing Hero) - this drives the gradient system via .hero CSS custom properties.
accentColorSystem.topicOverride: Block attribute (e.g., useTopicColor: boolean) when enabled, adds the topic's accent_color class to the section element, overriding the page accent color for this block's gradient only.
accentColorSystem.pillColor: The topic pill ALWAYS uses the topic's accent color for its background (accent-lighter) and border (accent-light), regardless of the page accent color setting. This matches the card-post.php pattern where categories have their own accent_color term meta.

keyDifferencesFromHeroSecondary: No manual image upload - uses post thumbnail automatically
No eyebrow field - replaced by dynamic topic pill
No heading field - uses post title automatically
No description field - optional excerpt toggle
No CTA buttons - replaced by author/date metadata
New topic pill element with topic-specific accent colors
New block option: use topic accent color instead of page accent color
Designed for template editor use (always in template mode effectively)

phpDataSourcing.title: get_the_title()
phpDataSourcing.excerpt: get_the_excerpt() - only when showExcerpt is enabled
phpDataSourcing.author: get_the_author()
phpDataSourcing.date: get_the_date() - uses WordPress date format setting
phpDataSourcing.pageAccentColor: Already on body class via ign_accent_color_body_class filter

output.figmaScreenshot: Captured via get_screenshot for node 669:33688 - shows full Post Hero with neon-green gradient background, students photo with mask fade, 'SOCIAL OPPORTUNITIES' pill in green, 'A lifehack: Decoding your professors and peers' title in Anton, and 'By: Lubna Patel / Published on: October 2, 2025' metadata below.
